category_sources: Official repository README says skopeo performs operations on container images and image repositories.
source_facts.description says it works with remote image registries.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use skopeo.
docs_sources: Official README provides overview and examples: https://github.com/containers/skopeo#readme.
Official repository has a docs directory for command man pages: https://github.com/containers/skopeo/tree/main/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/containers/skopeo; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README documents copying, inspecting, deleting, syncing, and signing container images.
source_facts.description identifies remote image registry work.
